summary: Capital-intensive companies are likely to report solid earnings this season, further outperforming peers that are more reliant on human or digital assets, according to Goldman Sachs Group Inc. strategists.

summary: Standard Nuclear Inc., a maker of fuel for nuclear reactors, is seeking to raise as much as $383 million in a US initial public offering.

title_cn: IEA表示，伊朗战争导致天然气需求自2022年以来首次下降
summary: Global gas demand is poised for the first annual drop since the 2022 energy crisis because of higher prices caused by the Iran war, according to the International Energy Agency.

title: Dudley: Still Bullish on AI Spending

title: Samsung Earnings Send Chip Stocks Tumbling as Kospi Triggers Circuit Breaker | The Pulse 7/7/2026
title_cn: Kospi 触发熔断，三星财报导致芯片股暴跌脉搏 7/7/2026
summary:
"The Pulse With Francine Lacqua" is all about conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, economics, finance and politics. Based in London, we go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

Today's guests: Jim Reid, Deutsche Bank Research Institute Head and Global Head of Macro and Thematic Research; Marta Prochwicz, European Council on Foreign Relations Deputy Head of the Warsaw office; Pierroberto Folgiero, Fincantieri CEO    (Source: Bloomberg)

summary: President Donald Trump lands in Ankara, Turkey for the NATO summit where he will start the day visiting with Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdogan. Bloomberg's Annmarie Hordern is on the ground with the latest. (Source: Bloomberg)

summary: S&P 500 Index futures slip 0.2% as of 7:41 a.m. in New York. Volatility hit chipmakers after Samsung Electronics Co.’s blowout earnings left investors wanting more.

title: US Stocks Fall as Samsung Results Fail to Impress | Bloomberg Brief 7/07/2026
title_cn: 三星业绩未能给人留下深刻印象，美国股市下跌彭博简报 2026 年 7 月 7 日
summary: US equity futures slide as global chipmakers drag following Samsung's earnings results. The world's largest chipmaker by market value failed to impress investors even with its 19-fold profit surge. Oil jumps as fresh attacks on ships in and around the Strait of Hormuz raise concerns about the US-Iran deal. NATO Summit kicks off in Ankara, Turkey. Katrina Dudley of Franklin Templeton discusses tech valuations.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tech Volatility Hits Highest Since Dot-Com Bust Next to S&P 500

summary: US stock futures pointed to renewed weakness in technology shares after Samsung Electronics Co.’s earnings failed to satisfy investors, renewing pressure on chipmakers across global markets.

summary: A crude oil tanker sailing under the flag of Saudi Arabia sustained damage while navigating the Strait of Hormuz, a person with knowledge of the matter said, the latest incident to highlight that navigation through the waterway remains risky.

title: Le Pen Judgement Day, Samsung Drops after Profit Beat | The Opening Trade 7/7/2026
title_cn: 勒庞审判日，三星盈利超预期后股价下跌开盘交易 7/7/2026
summary:
The outcome of Marine Le Pen’s appeal of her conviction for embezzling public funds could shape French and European politics for years. The decision due today from the three-judge appellate panel will determine not only whether the 57-year-old three-time presidential candidate gets another shot at the Élysée, but whether Jordan Bardella, her 30-year-old protégé, becomes the National Rally’s face in what polls suggest could be the far-right party’s best opportunity yet to win power.

The chip sector came under more pressure, with Samsung Electronics, whose shares have more than doubled this year, plunging as much as 10% despite reporting a 19-fold jump in profit. 

The Opening Trade has everything you need to know as markets open across Europe. With analysis you won't find anywhere else, we break down the biggest stories of the day and speak to top guests who have skin in the game. Hosted by Anna Edwards and Guy Johnson. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gold Falls as Traders Weigh Fed Rate Path and Hormuz Attacks

summary: Julian Emanuel, Evercore ISI chief equity and quantitative strategist, doesn't believe the Federal Reserve will move on interest rates this year. Emanuel is maintaining his S&P 500 year-end price target of 7,750 even though stocks have become more volatile. He speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

summary: Artificial intelligence is likely to enhance productivity signficantly but any such impact on economies may still be years away, Deutsche Bank analyst Jim Reid said.

summary: SpaceX joins the Nasdaq 100 Index Tuesday as Wall Street brokerages launch coverage of Elon Musk’s rocket, satellite and artificial intelligence company with a clear consensus: buy the stock.

title_cn: WEF创始人施瓦布声称他在家中发现了间谍设备
summary: World Economic Forum founder Klaus Schwab has filed a criminal complaint following the alleged discovery of a secret listening device planted in his home office in Geneva.

title: Renewables Hit Record Share of India Power Mix as Coal Flatlines
title_cn: 可再生能源在印度电力结构中的份额创下历史新高，而煤炭则趋于平淡
summary: The share of renewable energy in India’s electricity mix rose to a record high this summer, highlighting the increasing importance of solar and wind in the world’s third-largest emitter.

title: Extreme SK Hynix Stock Swings Add Wild Card to $28 Billion Deal

summary: SK Hynix Inc.’s New York listing, currently on track to be the largest ever by a foreign company in the US, is facing an unusual source of uncertainty for a major offering: the wildest swings seen in global chip stocks in years.

title: ECB Asks Banks for Plans to Address AI Cybersecurity Threats
title_cn: 欧洲央行要求银行提供应对人工智能网络安全威胁的计划
summary: Europe’s banking regulator asked banks to come up with plans to address the growing threat from frontier artificial intelligence models such as Anthropic PBC’s Claude Mythos to cybersecurity.

title: Samsung’s Record Profit Fails to Impress After AI Chip Rally
title_cn: AI芯片上涨后，三星创纪录的利润未能给人留下深刻印象
summary: Samsung Electronics Co.’s quarterly profit surged 19-fold, an increase that still wasn’t enough for investors whose expectations for continued AI-fueled growth had driven the stock up more than 150% this year.

title: India Objection to WhatsApp Username Switch Gets Somalia Backing
title_cn: 印度反对 WhatsApp 用户名转换得到索马里支持
summary: Somalia joined India in objecting to Meta Platforms Inc.’s planned WhatsApp username feature, citing security concerns in a country that’s been battling Islamist militants for two decades.

title: Nuveen's Cooper Sees Rotation Back Into Hyperscalers
title_cn: Nuveen 的 Cooper 预计将回归超大规模
summary: Laura Cooper, global investment strategist and macro credit head at Nuveen, discusses the outlook for equity markets and why she sees the potential for a rotation back into hyperscalers. "Valuations have come off, we're now seeing revenue growth have a slight upturn going forward, and we've seen several weeks of consecutive outflows," Cooper tells Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: BAE-Backed Venture Capital Firm Expeditions Raises €197 Million Fund for European Defense Startups
title_cn: BAE 支持的风险投资公司 Expeditions 为欧洲国防初创公司筹集 1.97 亿欧元资金
summary: A defense-tech venture capital firm backed by BAE Systems and the NATO Innovation Fund has raised a €197 million ($225 million) fund to help develop sovereign military technologies in Europe.

title: Google and RWE Back German Nuclear Startup Proxima Fusion at €2.4 Billion Valuation
title_cn: Google 和 RWE 以 24 亿欧元的估值支持德国核电初创公司 Proxima Fusion
summary: German startup Proxima Fusion has raised €411 million ($469 million) from a range of investors, including national energy firm RWE AG and Alphabet Inc.’s Google, to develop a nuclear fusion plant it hopes will be operational in the 2030s.

title: Asia Stocks Drop on Chip Selloff, Nasdaq Futures Down
title_cn: 亚洲股市因芯片抛售而下跌，纳斯达克期货下跌
summary: Asian equities fell as renewed selling in technology stocks, including Samsung Electronics Co. and SK Hynix Inc., deepened concerns that the AI-driven rally may have run ahead of itself. Futures for the tech-heavy Nasdaq 100 Index retreated 1.1%, suggesting Monday’s rebound on Wall Street was losing momentum. European shares were also set for losses. Bloomberg's Avril Hong and Mark Cranfield report. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Won’t Bring Back Era of Rapid Growth, Says Nobel Prize Winner
title_cn: 诺贝尔奖获得者表示，人工智能不会带回快速增长的时代
summary: A Nobel Prize-winning economist has warned that artificial intelligence will not return Western economies to the era of rapid productivity growth, which may be gone forever.

title: Why Samsung’s Record Profit Failed to Impress Investors
title_cn: 为什么三星创纪录的利润未能打动投资者
summary: Samsung Electronics Co.’s quarterly profit surged 19-fold but failed to impress investors used to eye-catching growth from the suppliers of AI chips. Bloomberg's Haslinda Amin speaks with Constellation Research's Day Wang to understand what investors are thinking. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Europe’s Defense Stocks Rally Has Much Riding on NATO Summit
title_cn: 欧洲国防股上涨很大程度上得益于北约峰会

title: Self-Driving Startup Turing Gets AMD Backing and GPUs

title: Tencent Sells $1.5 Billion Kuaishou Stake as AI Pivot Quickens
title_cn: 随着 AI 转型加速，腾讯出售 15 亿美元快手股份
summary: Tencent Holdings Ltd. sold $1.5 billion of stock in Chinese TikTok rival Kuaishou Technology, paring mature internet bets during a pivot to artificial intelligence.

title: Chinese Firms Leave Nvidia for Local AI Suppliers, Survey Shows
title_cn: 调查显示，中国企业纷纷放弃英伟达，转向本土人工智能供应商
summary: Chinese companies are ditching Nvidia Corp.’s advanced accelerators in favor of domestic silicon, underscoring how tensions with the US are reshaping the AI infrastructure buildout and propelling Beijing’s ambitions to substitute American technology.

title: WiseTech Shares Jump After Billionaire White Quits as Chair
title_cn: 亿万富翁怀特辞去董事长职务后慧咨科技股价大涨
summary: Billionaire Richard White has stepped down as chair of WiseTech Global Ltd., just weeks after denying he was involved in human trafficking amid reports he was being investigated by police over claims he used a woman’s immigration status for sex.

title: Trump Says US Will Consider Selling Turkey F-35 Fighter Jets
title_cn: 特朗普称美国将考虑向土耳其出售F-35战斗机
summary: President Donald Trump gave another strong indication that he may soon try to reverse a ban on Turkey buying F-35 fighter jets from the US.

title: Trump Again Asks Supreme Court to Toss Out Carroll Award
title_cn: 特朗普再次要求最高法院撤销卡罗尔奖
summary: President Donald Trump filed a last-ditch plea with the US Supreme Court as he tries to prevent the writer E. Jean Carroll from collecting $5 million awarded by a jury that found he had sexually abused and defamed her.

title: Canada Wins Support From Eight Countries for New Defense Bank
title_cn: 加拿大新国防银行赢得八个国家的支持
summary: Prime Minister Mark Carney said eight other countries have agreed to back the Defence, Security and Resilience Bank, a new financial institution that would invest in the defense industry and be hosted by Canada.

title: Michigan Democrats Clash Over Party’s Future in Senate Race
title_cn: 密歇根州民主党在参议院竞选中就党的未来发生冲突
summary: Michigan’s Democratic Senate primary is transforming into a pivotal clash between progressives and moderates after a series of wins for left-leaning candidates in other states rattled the party’s establishment.

title: Hormuz Strike Threatens Progress on Europe’s De-mining Mission
title_cn: 霍尔木兹罢工威胁欧洲排雷任务的进展
summary: The UK and France’s plans to de-mine the Strait of Hormuz were dealt a setback after a fresh attack on a vessel passing through the waterway, days after Oman granted the European powers permission to help clear its southern route.

title: Le Pen Free to Run in French Presidential Race After Appeal
title_cn: 勒庞上诉后获自由参加法国总统竞选
summary: Marine Le Pen was cleared by appeal judges to enter the 2027 French presidential race if she drops a vow never to stand for office wearing an electronic bracelet.

title: Swedish Premier Rebuffs Notion of Russia Planning to Attack NATO
title_cn: 瑞典总理否认俄罗斯计划攻击北约
summary: Sweden’s Prime Minister Ulf Kristersson brushed off any suggestion Russia might be planning a conventional attack on a NATO country.

title: UK Mulls Bursaries for Young People to Ease Benefits Cliff-Edge
title_cn: 英国考虑为年轻人提供助学金以缓解悬崖边缘的福利
summary: UK ministers are looking at proposals to give bursaries to young people who might otherwise be deterred from taking up apprenticeships because of subsequent cuts to their welfare payments.

title: Qatari LNG Ship Struck in Strait of Hormuz, Testing US Talks
title_cn: 卡塔尔液化天然气船在霍尔木兹海峡触礁，考验美国谈判
summary: A Qatari liquefied natural gas carrier was hit and a laden Saudi oil tanker suffered damage as they exited the Strait of Hormuz, heightening unease among shipowners and testing a US-Iran agreement to halt attacks.

title: Carney and Merz Lay Foundations for a New Transatlantic Alliance
title_cn: 卡尼和默兹为新的跨大西洋联盟奠定基础
summary: A multi-billion dollar deal to build as many as 12 new submarines for Canada promises a badly needed boost for Germany’s ailing economy. It also represents a down payment on the new transatlantic relationship.

title: Sweden Sees 'Good Reason' to Provide Ukraine With Air-Defense Systems
title_cn: 瑞典认为向乌克兰提供防空系统有“充分理由”
summary: Swedish Prime Minster Ulf Kristersson says that there is "good reason" to provide Ukraine with air-defense systems to counter Russian missile strikes. He made the comments during an interview with Bloomberg's Oliver Crook at the NATO Summit in Ankara, Turkey. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: It’s a Different, More Confident Zelenskyy Coming to NATO This Year
title_cn: 泽连斯基今年来到北约，是一个不同的、更加自信的人
summary: Volodymyr Zelenskyy is in good spirits ahead of talks with Donald Trump and other NATO leaders at their summit in Turkey, according to a person who spoke with him in recent days. The Ukrainian president has grounds for confidence.

title: NATO Nations Can't Afford to Spend More on Defense, Lieber Says
title_cn: 利伯表示，北约国家无力承担更多国防开支
summary: Eurasia Group Managing Director for the US Jon Lieber says cash strapped European nations can't afford to spend more on defense as President Donald Trump is asking for. Trump has arrived in Turkey for a NATO summit. Lieber speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Welcomed by Erdogan in Ankara for NATO Summit
title_cn: 特朗普在安卡拉出席北约峰会受到埃尔多安的欢迎
summary: Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdogan welcomes President Donald Trump in Ankara, as his US counterpart arrives for the 2026 NATO Summit. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Farage to Make Statement on Future Amid Scrutiny Over Donations
title_cn: 法拉奇在捐款审查中就未来发表声明
summary: Nigel Farage said he would make a statement “on my future in public life” later on Tuesday following a series of damaging articles about undeclared donations that raised questions about his probity.

title: Ukraine Says It Hit Russian Ships to Deepen Crimea’s Fuel Crunch
title_cn: 乌克兰称袭击俄罗斯船只是为了加剧克里米亚的燃料短缺
summary: Ukraine said it attacked eight small Russian fuel tankers overnight in the Sea of Azov, as Kyiv seeks to cut off gasoline supplies to occupied Crimea.

title: Zelenskyy: Europe Needs Stronger Defense Against Russian Ballistic Missiles
title_cn: 泽连斯基：欧洲需要加强防御俄罗斯弹道导弹
summary: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy speaks at the NATO Summit in Ankara about Europe's anti-ballistic missile capabilities. "This is Russia's last major advantage," Zelenskyy says. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: ‘Unpleasant Surprises’ Lurk for NATO in Trump Meeting
title_cn: 北约在特朗普会议上潜伏着“不愉快的意外”
summary: As usual, the alliance faces a tough audience of one

title: Finland, Allies to Jointly Develop Patria’s All-Terrain Vehicle
title_cn: 芬兰与盟国共同开发Patria全地形车
summary: Finland, Norway and Latvia agreed to cooperate on the development and possible joint purchases of tracked vehicles from Patria Oyj in the latest sign that European governments are increasingly working to pool orders of defense equipment amid growing threats from Russia.

title: Trump Arrives in Ankara for NATO Summit
title_cn: 特朗普抵达安卡拉出席北约峰会
summary: US President Donald Trump arrives in Ankara, Turkey, for the NATO summit. He is welcomed by Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdogan (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Britain Needs £100 Billion a Year to Stabilize Public Debt, Watchdog Says
title_cn: 监管机构表示，英国每年需要 1000 亿英镑来稳定公共债务
summary: Andy Burnham faces a £100 billion ($134 billion) challenge if he wants to put Britain’s public finances on a sustainable path, the government’s fiscal watchdog warned.

title: Le Pen Cleared to Run in 2027 French Presidential Race
title_cn: 勒庞获准参加 2027 年法国总统竞选
summary: Marine Le Pen leaves court in Paris on July 7. Photographer: Dimitar Dilkoff/AFP/Getty Images

title: Modi, Prabowo Seal BrahMos and Astra Missile Deals to Deepen Defense Ties
title_cn: 莫迪、普拉博沃签署布拉莫斯和阿斯特拉导弹协议，以深化防务关系
summary: India and Indonesia took a major step toward closer defense cooperation on Tuesday, signing agreements on missile systems as Prime Minister Narendra Modi met Indonesian President Prabowo Subianto in Jakarta.

title: China’s ICBM Tests Point to New Normal Rattling the Pacific
title_cn: 中国的洲际弹道导弹试验预示着太平洋地区的新常态
summary: China’s test this week of a submarine-fired ballistic missile may mark the beginning of more regular Pacific launches as the country advances its arsenal for delivering nuclear warheads, unsettling governments already wary of Beijing’s military buildup.

title: Singapore Plans Stiff Penalties for Drink Driving, Holding Phone
title_cn: 新加坡计划对酒后驾驶、拿着手机进行严厉处罚
summary: Singapore is looking to tighten enforcement and increase penalties for traffic violations as road fatalities in the city-state climbed.

title: US Is ‘Really Invested’ in Keeping Troops in Europe, Latvia Says
title_cn: 拉脱维亚称美国“真正投入”在欧洲驻军
summary: The US has “really invested interest” to keep its troops in Europe, Latvian Foreign Minister Baiba Braze said as NATO allies await the outcome of Washington’s review of its military presence on the continent.

title: Duterte’s Alleged ‘Kill’ Threat Against Marcos Played at Trial
title_cn: 杜特尔特在审判中对马科斯进行了所谓的“杀死”威胁
summary: A video in which Philippine Vice President Sara Duterte allegedly threatened to have archrival President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. assassinated took center stage during the second day of her impeachment trial, after a defiant Duterte vowed to stand firm against efforts to oust her.

title: France Awaits Ruling on Whether Le Pen Can Run for President
title_cn: 法国等待勒庞能否竞选总统的裁决
summary: If she can’t, her right-wing party will turn to 30-year-old protégé Jordan Bardella.
